article.description: — Jaylon Tyson scored a career-high 39 points, Evan Mobley's dunk with 4.8 seconds left was the winner and the short-handed Cleveland Cavaliers completed a two-game sweep of the 76ers in Philadelphia with a 117-115 victory on Friday night.
article.headline: Tyson scores career-high 39, Mobley hits winner to lift Cavaliers to 2-game sweep of 76ers

images.caption: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
images.name: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

article.linkText: Tyson scores career-high 39, Mobley hits winner to lift Cavaliers to 2-game sweep of 76ers
article.story: PHILADELPHIA -- — Jaylon Tyson scored a career-high 39 points, Evan Mobley's dunk with 4.8 seconds left was the winner and the short-handed Cleveland Cavaliers completed a two-game sweep of the 76ers in Philadelphia with a 117-115 victory on Friday night. Donovan Mitchell added 13 points, 12 assists and nine rebounds for Cleveland, which rallied from an 11-point deficit in the fourth quarter. The Cavaliers defeated the 76ers 133-107 on Wednesday. Joel Embiid scored 33 points and Tyrese Maxey had 22 points, nine assists and five steals for the 76ers. Cleveland was without Darius Garland (right big toe soreness) and Sam Merrill (right hand sprain), who were both injured on Wednesday. Coach Kenny Atkinson said both will be reevaluated when the team returns to Cleveland this weekend. The 76ers looked in control when Paul George hit a jumper with 8:47 remaining for an 11-point lead. But the Cavaliers used a 13-2 run, capped by De’Andre Hunter’s 3-pointer with 5:53 left, to tie it at 102. Philadelphia moved ahead by seven points after turnovers by the Cavs on three straight possessions, but Cleveland hung around. Hunter’s layup with just over a minute left put the Cavs up a point. After Mobley made one of two free throws with 22.7 seconds remaining, Maxey tied it on a runner with 8.1 seconds left. After a timeout, Tyson set up Mobley near the basket for an easy dunk to put Cleveland in front by two. Maxey’s shot from just beyond half court that could have won the game went long. Dominick Barlow was back in the lineup for Philadelphia after leaving Wednesday’s game early due to a back contusion. He was questionable entering the contest and finished with two points. Up next Cavaliers: Host Oklahoma City on Monday. 76ers: Host Indiana on Monday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

videos.description: Paul George intercepts the pass and drives to the basket for two.
videos.headline: Paul George forces turnover, then puts in a layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Paul George forces turnover, then puts in a layup) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Adem Bona gets the pass down the middle and slams it home.
videos.headline: Adem Bona throws it down

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Adem Bona throws it down) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Tyrese Maxey makes a great defensive play, then finds Paul George for the 3-pointer.
videos.headline: Tyrese Maxey gets the steal, Paul George cashes in

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tyrese Maxey gets the steal, Paul George cashes in) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Tyrese Proctor steals the ball then dunks it on the other end.
videos.headline: Tyrese Proctor gets the steal and the slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tyrese Proctor gets the steal and the slam) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Nae'Qwan Tomlin plays give-and-go before throwing down the dunk.
videos.headline: Nae'Qwan Tomlin rocks the rim

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Nae'Qwan Tomlin rocks the rim) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Nae'Qwan Tomlin gets the pass inside and throws down a massive jam over Joel Embiid.
videos.headline: Nae'Qwan Tomlin dunks over Joel Embiid

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Nae'Qwan Tomlin dunks over Joel Embiid) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Adem Bona loses a shoe and continues playing before slipping and falling in front of the basket.
videos.headline: Adem Bona plays for more than 30 seconds with only one shoe

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Adem Bona plays for more than 30 seconds with only one shoe) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: De'Andre Hunter sizes up Joel Embiid then dunks right over him.
videos.headline: De'Andre Hunter puts Joel Embiid on a poster

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (De'Andre Hunter puts Joel Embiid on a poster) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Evan Mobley slams home a dunk to give the Cavaliers a late lead, then Tyrese Maxey's half-court heave is no good.
videos.headline: Cavs hang on late thanks to Evan Mobley's dunk, defensive stop

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cavs hang on late thanks to Evan Mobley's dunk, defensive stop) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Jaylon Tyson has a career night, putting up 39 points in the Cavaliers' win over the 76ers.
videos.headline: Jaylon Tyson's big night helps Cavs fend off 76ers
